australian_passport_first_name.title: First Name
australian_passport_first_name.description: Given name(s) as shown on the Australian passport

australian_passport_middle_name.title: Middle Name
australian_passport_middle_name.description: Middle name as shown on the Australian passport

australian_passport_last_name.title: Last Name
australian_passport_last_name.description: Surname as shown on the Australian passport

australian_passport_number.title: Passport Number
australian_passport_number.description: Document number as shown in the top-right of the Australian passport data page (e.g. RA0123456)

australian_passport_date_of_birth.title: Date of Birth
australian_passport_date_of_birth.description: Date of birth as shown on the Australian passport data page

australian_passport_date_of_issue.title: Date of Issue
australian_passport_date_of_issue.description: Date of issue as shown on the Australian passport data page

australian_passport_expiry_date.title: Expiry Date
australian_passport_expiry_date.description: Date of expiry as shown on the Australian passport data page

australian_passport_nationality.title: Nationality
australian_passport_nationality.description: Nationality as shown on the Australian passport data page (e.g. AUSTRALIAN)

australian_passport_gender.title: Gender
australian_passport_gender.description: Sex as shown on the Australian passport data page (M, F, or X)

australian_passport_place_of_birth.title: Place of Birth
australian_passport_place_of_birth.description: Place of birth as shown on the Australian passport data page (e.g. CANBERRA)

commencement_document_front.title: Document Front Photo
commencement_document_front.description: Photo of the Australian passport data page

commencement_document_back.title: Document Back Photo
commencement_document_back.description: Photo of the Australian passport observations page
